characters.name: LIISA
characters.description: Väike inimene, roosade põskedega tüdruk. Seljas soe sinine talvemantel ja punane müts, millel on väike tutt. Naeratav ja rõõmsameelne näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: TOOMAS
characters.description: Väike inimene, tumedate juustega poiss. Seljas soe roheline talvemantel ja sinine sall. Suured uudishimulikud silmad. Sõbralik ja rõõmsameelne näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: LIISA JA TOOMASE TUBA
locations.description: Cozy children's room with light yellow walls and a warm wooden floor. A single large window on the back wall shows a view of gently falling snow and distant snow-covered evergreen trees. A colorful rug with a simple pattern is on the floor. A small, simple wooden chest is against the right wall. The room is tidy and well-lit with soft, natural light from the window. Cartoon style.

locations.name: LUMINE MÄGI
locations.description: A gentle snow-covered hill on a sunny winter day. The ground is covered in sparkling white snow. Several snow-covered evergreen trees are scattered around the hill. The sky is bright blue and clear. The atmosphere is crisp and cheerful. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Liisa and Toomas are standing in a cozy children's room with light yellow walls and a warm wooden floor. A single large window on the back wall shows a view of gently falling snow and distant snow-covered evergreen trees. Liisa wears a warm blue winter coat and a red hat, Toomas wears a warm green winter coat and a blue scarf. They are looking at each other, smiling with bright, happy expressions. A colorful rug with a simple pattern is on the floor. A small, simple wooden chest is against the right wall. Soft, natural light from the window fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are standing in their cozy children's room. Liisa points a finger upwards as if having an idea, smiling excitedly. Toomas looks at her, his eyes wide with curiosity and a happy expression. They are both wearing their warm winter coats and hats. The light yellow walls, wooden floor, window showing snowy trees, colorful rug, and wooden chest are visible in the room. Soft, natural light from the window fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are kneeling in their cozy children's room. Liisa is opening the lid of a small, simple wooden chest against the right wall, looking inside. Toomas is peeking over her shoulder, smiling. They are both wearing their warm winter coats and hats. The light yellow walls, wooden floor, window showing snowy trees, and colorful rug are visible. Soft, natural light from the window fills the room. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are outside on a gentle snow-covered hill. They are both standing and pulling a bright red sled behind them. Liisa is holding the rope of the sled, and Toomas is walking beside her, looking ahead with a happy expression. They are wearing their warm winter coats and hats. The hill is covered in sparkling white snow, with snow-covered evergreen trees in the background. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are happily sitting on a bright red sled, gliding down a gentle snow-covered hill. Snow is lightly spraying up from the sides of the sled as it moves. Both children are smiling broadly, enjoying the ride. They are wearing their warm winter coats and hats. Snow-covered evergreen trees are visible on the hill. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are still on the bright red sled, now moving faster down the snow-covered hill. Their hair is slightly blowing back, and their expressions are full of exhilaration and joy. Snow is spraying up more noticeably from the sled. They are wearing their warm winter coats and hats. Snow-covered evergreen trees are in the background. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are laughing joyfully while still on the bright red sled, having almost reached the bottom of the gentle snow-covered hill. They are looking at each other, their faces full of happiness. They are wearing their warm winter coats and hats. Snow-covered evergreen trees are visible. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas have stopped at the bottom of the gentle snow-covered hill, next to their bright red sled. They are both standing, looking back up the hill, with big smiles on their faces, excited about their ride. They are wearing their warm winter coats and hats. Snow-covered evergreen trees are in the background. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Toomas are standing at the bottom of the snow-covered hill, holding hands, with their bright red sled beside them. They are looking at the viewer with satisfied and very happy smiles. They are wearing their warm winter coats and hats. Snow-covered evergreen trees are in the background. The sky is bright blue. The atmosphere is joyful and peaceful. Cartoon style.
